name: oh-my-project
description: Project environment & structure governance harness — knows your local directory like a second brain. Ships generic, specializes to your project the more you use it: scans structure, codifies naming/layout rules, organizes files safely, tracks datasets (checksum/split/lineage), governs Docker environment assets (generates Dockerfile/compose into .omp/env/, image naming + inventory, anti-pattern audit with external-standard provenance), and learns project-specific rules over time. SSOT lives in a hidden .omp/ folder (human .md + machine .json).
